name: Meta: Commodity Momentum + Trend-Skew
description: Equal-weight blend of Commodity Momentum Top-2 (15% vol) and Trend-Signal Risk Parity (15% vol). Pairs hard-asset momentum (inflation-regime capture) with quality trend signals filtered by skewness-aware risk parity. Two complementary alpha sources: commodity supply/demand momentum + cross-asset trending with tail-risk awareness.
